title: Beneficiary’s access to estate information is limited to his own personal information under PIPEDA
summary: An individual claimed he was a beneficiary to the separate estates of his grandmother and mother. He requested access under PIPEDA to information and documents pertaining to the estates from a legal firm that had acted as a legal agent for another law firm involved in administering the two estates. Specifically, he sought access to inform...
